name: Rose Luxury Perfume Set
description: A curated trio of floral eau de parfum, silk ribbon, and a keepsake box — crafted for unforgettable moments.

reviews.author: Claire U.
reviews.text: Packaging felt like a boutique in Paris. My sister cried (happy tears).

reviews.author: Jean-Paul K.
reviews.text: Delivered to Kigali in two days. Scents are soft, not overpowering.

name: Kigali Birthday Luxe Box
description: Celebrate with artisan treats, a mini sparkling juice, confetti, and a candle — the ultimate birthday gesture.

reviews.author: Mutesi A.
reviews.text: Everything was fresh and beautifully arranged.

name: Artisan Chocolate & Wine
description: Single-origin dark bars paired with a refined non-alcoholic red — perfect for evening gifting.

name: Spa Serenity Hamper
description: Calm in a basket: bath salts, body oil, silk eye mask, and a bamboo brush.

name: Linen Overshirt — Cream
description: Breathable European linen blend, relaxed tailoring, mother-of-pearl buttons.

name: Silk Evening Dress
description: Bias-cut silk satin, ankle length, invisible zipper — runway softness.

name: Kids Celebration Outfit
description: Organic cotton set with bow detail — gentle on skin, big on charm.

name: Minimal Leather Sneakers
description: Full-grain leather, cushioned footbed, tonal laces — everyday luxury.

name: Woven Sandals — Natural
description: Hand-woven straps, leather sole, soft arch support for warm evenings.

name: Rose Gold Watch
description: Sapphire crystal, Swiss movement, blush dial — an heirloom in the making.

name: Pearl Drop Earrings
description: Freshwater pearls on 14k rose gold hooks — luminous and lightweight.

name: Cashmere Scarf Gift Set
description: Mongolian cashmere wrap with monogram-ready tag and storage box.
